ShortDescription.Value: Turn your city's metro network into a clean, readable metro map.

Publish.LongDescription:
Turn the metro/subway network of your Cities: Skylines II city into a clean, readable metro map.
Beta.6 includes a read-only in-game preview. Open the metro-map button in the top-right toolbar to inspect the current city, refresh it, switch between geographic and schematic views, filter labels, zoom/pan, export JSON, or save the current SVG without leaving the game.
For the most complete official-style schematic map, export your city's metro network to JSON and open it in the free companion Windows Viewer. The Viewer can save SVG, PNG, or PDF for wallpapers, posters, printing, and sharing.
How to use: 1. Load a city and click the metro-map button in the top-right toolbar for the in-game preview. 2. In Options > CS2 Metro Diagram, choose Auto / English / Simplified Chinese and an export folder. 3. Export JSON, then open the Viewer and click "Open Default Export" for the full schematic workflow. 4. Adjust the layout/size if you like, then save as SVG, PNG, or PDF.
The default map layout draws lines horizontal, vertical, or 45-degree, renders lines that share a track as parallel lines, and fills the canvas — the same conventions real metro maps use.
Download the Viewer and full source from GitHub: https://github.com/Eriksas/Cities-Skylines-2-Metro-Viewer
Viewer download mirror (Baidu Netdisk) / Viewer 下载（百度网盘）: https://pan.baidu.com/s/5RspPYzFb0dPoOE0aZu7d4A
Does your city's map not look quite right? Share your metro-export.json in a GitHub issue and the next version will be tuned against YOUR city. 觉得你的城市图排得不够好？把 metro-export.json 发到 GitHub issue，下个版本就拿你的城市调优。
Beta notes: - Metro/subway only. - Preview/export only; it never edits your city. - The desktop Viewer remains recommended for manual layout editing and PNG/PDF export.
Publish.ChangeLog: Beta.8 - all lines now display (first player bug report, thank you!): - Fixed: metro lines you never renamed exported as "地铁路线工具" and were merged into one line, so a city with 8 lines showed only 3. All lines now render, each with its own color. - Fixed: auto-named lines now export with their real numbered names ("地铁 3 号线" / "Metro Line 3"). Re-export your city once after updating to refresh the names. - Lines that share a numbered name (e.g. two "10号线" services) still merge into one family as before.
